title: Xi Calls for All-Out Rescue After Coal Mine Explosion Kills at Least 90 in China
summary_full: The death count rose drastically on Saturday as the Chinese leader, Xi Jinping, called for an investigation and emphasized the need to “hold those responsible to account.”
summary_public: The death count rose drastically on Saturday as the Chinese leader, Xi Jinping, called for an investigation and emphasized the need to “hold those responsible to account.”
